# Travel Rules
> AI-powered travel assistant app for van lifers, campers, road trippers and backpackers.

Travel Rules is a free iOS app that helps travellers plan trips, pack smart, and stay informed about travel rules and entry requirements for each country. Built for van life, camping, road trips and backpacking adventures.

## App
- iOS App: https://apps.apple.com/app/travel-rules/id6451070215
- Platform: iOS (iPhone & iPad)
- Price: Free (with optional premium)
- Category: Travel
- Languages: Polish, English, Spanish

## Features
- AI trip planner — conversational AI travel assistant for route planning
- Country travel rules — entry requirements, camping laws, visa info per country
- Packing checklist — customisable lists for van life and road trips
- GPS map — offline-capable map for campers and van lifers
- Works offline — essential for remote travel without internet

## Target audience
Van lifers, campers, road trippers, backpackers, digital nomads, families travelling by camper van, overlanders, slow travellers

## Keywords
van life, vanlife, kamper, road trip, camping, AI trip planner, travel planner, packing list, travel rules, entry requirements, wild camping, backpacking, digital nomad, camper van, overlanding, travel app, trip planning app, aplikacja do planowania podróży, planowanie trasy kamperem, aplikacja dla kamperowiczów, lista pakowania, zasady wjazdu, przepisy celne, podróż kamperem, wyjazd w trasę, aplikacja podróżnicza, planowanie campingu

## Pricing
- Free tier: 3 AI questions/day, 5 tips/day
- Trip Pass: $1.99 (7 days full access)
- Premium Monthly: $4.99/month
- Premium Annual: $29.99/year
